name: @forgeax/engine-rhi-null
description: Headless no-op RHI backend for structural unit tests — implements @forgeax/engine-rhi with zero GPU/DOM dependency.

fps.reason: headless no-op backend has no runtime canvas; no fps to report

bench.reason: no-op backend has no hot path; bench focus stays on real backends

gate.reason: no standalone binary gate; structural assertions provided by runtime dogfood unit tests consuming RhiNull via Channel 1
